name: Cottage-Herb Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the milk, cottage cheese, and lemon juice to a blender container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (onion slices, radishes, mixed salad herbs, parsley sprig, and salt) to the blender.
4. Blend until all vegetables are chopped.
5. Chill before serving.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
